project_name: Familia Reyes-Montoya — Standalone Residential — Cerritos, BCS
payment_instructions: Bank transfer to Oficio Taller. Bank: BBVA México. CLABE: [CLABE — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]. Reference: PRJ-2026-0316-familia-reyes-montoya.

line_items.description: Parti diagram, design narrative, preliminary floor plan sketches (1:200), site orientation concept, 3D massing model, material and color direction board — horizon-axis orientation and coastal site conditions documented
line_items.notes: Phase 1 fee = 20% of $90,000 total. M1 payment at contract signing covers Phase 1 commencement.

line_items.description: Floor plans (1:100), elevations, sections, roof plan, site plan, interior design criteria document, window and door schedule, preliminary structural coordination with coastal wind load requirements noted
line_items.notes: Phase 2 fee = 25% of $90,000 total. M2 payment triggered by client approval of Phase 1.

line_items.description: Structural engineering coordination (wind load), electrical single-line diagram, lighting layout, plumbing/hydraulic layout, irrigation plan, solar system layout, foundation plan, landscape and interior design coordination with TBD collaborators
line_items.notes: Phase 3 fee = 15% of $90,000 total. Funded through M2 milestone payment.

line_items.description: Fully coordinated construction drawing set (architectural + structural + MEP), detail sheets, finish schedule with coastal-grade material specs, door/window schedule (wind load rated), built-in furniture drawings, technical specifications document
line_items.notes: Phase 4 fee = 25% of $90,000 total. M3 payment triggered by client approval of executive plans.

line_items.description: Bid package preparation, bid comparison matrix (min. 2 contractors), recommendation with rationale, local BCS coastal contractor cost validation
line_items.notes: Phase 5 fee = 10% of $90,000 total. Covered within M3 payment.

line_items.description: Building permit application, coastal zone permit application (SEMARNAT/Municipio de Los Cabos), submission and correction management until permit issued
line_items.notes: Phase 6 fee = 5% of $90,000 total. Covered within M3 payment. Note: coastal zone permit adds lead time — phase duration authority-dependent.

payment_schedule_summary.name: Concept Design Approved
payment_schedule_summary.trigger_event: Client written approval of Phase 1 conceptual design

payment_schedule_summary.name: Executive Plans Approved
payment_schedule_summary.trigger_event: Executive plans package approved by client

construction_cost_reference.note: Construction cost reference from cost-basis.json (MXN). Architecture fee above is the client-agreed fixed fee in USD per seed data. Pool, solar, landscape, and interior design costs are not included in this budget — to be scoped separately.
